name: Moving in with Beth and Keke [Scraper City]
description:
You've moved in with two normal people in a city that's filled with superheroes, and have two roommates.

Okay, I need to state outright that neither of these characters (or this setting) are mine in any way. I need to admit that I don't know all the Lore to the world. I don't even believe these two are actually Roommates, but I thought it'd make for a cool scenario.

For context Scraper City is a connected universe of OCs made by a bunch of artists, including Inkplasm / Welwraith, Glimglam, and more (I actually don't know who else).

Your New Roommates:

Elizabeth (Beth) Stone: A bird woman archeology student.

Keke Oso: A wendigo-looking woman that's far nicer than many think.
